gigapan.description:
The trains to New Jersey are fast and comfortable.  The only problem is that the schedules, especially on the weekend, are a little sparse.

No real problem if you plan ahead, but a little dicey for casual use - especially if, like Rose, you are used to the Subway which runs more or  less 'all of the time.' 

Being constrained by a train schedule is stressful - not having the option to finish something because the next train is not for an hour is a bit stressful.  OTOH, the trains are clean, and comfortable, and fast, and cheap - $8 for an offpeak round trip.
